name: server.live
definition: Envoy process liveness where value 1 indicates live
absence_means: Envoy process not reporting or scrape path unavailable

name: server.uptime
definition: Envoy process uptime in seconds
absence_means: Recent restart or missing telemetry

name: server.memory_allocated
definition: Runtime allocated memory bytes for Envoy process
absence_means: Runtime memory telemetry missing
cardinality_footguns: pod level grouping can churn during rollouts

name: server.memory_heap_size
definition: Runtime heap size bytes for Envoy process
absence_means: Runtime heap telemetry missing
cardinality_footguns: pod level grouping can churn during rollouts

name: server.concurrency
definition: Configured Envoy worker concurrency
absence_means: Metric not emitted by some builds

name: listener.<name>.downstream_cx_total
definition: Total downstream connections accepted by listener
absence_means: No downstream traffic or missing listener telemetry
cardinality_footguns: listener cardinality can rise with many ports

name: listener.<name>.downstream_cx_active
definition: Current active downstream connections
absence_means: No active downstream clients or idle traffic
cardinality_footguns: listener address may be high cardinality across dynamic listeners

name: listener.<name>.downstream_cx_overflow
definition: Downstream listener connection overflow events
absence_means: No overflow pressure observed

name: listener.<name>.downstream_cx_destroy_remote_active_rq
definition: Remote closed downstream connection while request was active legacy name
absence_means: Legacy metric name not found in Tsuga use envoy_listener_downstream_cx_destroy instead

name: listener.<name>.downstream_cx_destroy
definition: Observed downstream connection destroy events
absence_means: No connection teardown events in window

name: listener.<name>.downstream_cx_overload_reject
definition: Listener rejected connection due to overload
absence_means: No overload rejection events

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_cx_active
definition: Current active upstream connections by cluster
absence_means: No active upstream traffic or idle cluster
cardinality_footguns: cluster name cardinality can grow with dynamic clusters

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_cx_connect_fail
definition: Upstream connection attempts that failed
absence_means: No connect failures observed

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_cx_connect_timeout
definition: Upstream connection attempts timing out
absence_means: No connect timeouts observed

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_total
definition: Total upstream requests forwarded by cluster
absence_means: No upstream request traffic or missing cluster stats
cardinality_footguns: cluster cardinality can spike with dynamic routing

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_2xx
definition: Legacy per-class upstream request metric not present in this Tsuga shape
absence_means: Use envoy_cluster_upstream_rq_xx filtered by response class 2xx

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_4xx
definition: Legacy per-class upstream request metric not present in this Tsuga shape
absence_means: Use envoy_cluster_upstream_rq_xx filtered by response class 4xx

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_5xx
definition: Legacy per-class upstream request metric not present in this Tsuga shape
absence_means: Use envoy_cluster_upstream_rq_xx filtered by response class 5xx

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_xx
definition: Upstream request count by response code class via context.envoy_response_code_class
absence_means: Response class tag missing or metric path unavailable
cardinality_footguns: response class split requires filter handling not separate metrics

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_timeout
definition: Upstream requests timing out
absence_means: No timeout failures observed

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_pending_overflow
definition: Requests dropped due to pending queue overflow
absence_means: No pending overflow events

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_retry
definition: Requests retried by Envoy policy
absence_means: Retry policy disabled or no retry events

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_retry_success
definition: Retried upstream requests that eventually succeeded
absence_means: No successful retries observed

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_per_try_timeout
definition: Per-try timeout occurrences during retried requests
absence_means: No per-try timeout events

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_time_sum
definition: Histogram sum-style companion metric not present in this Tsuga shape
absence_means: Use envoy_cluster_upstream_rq_time histogram directly

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_time_count
definition: Histogram count-style companion metric not present in this Tsuga shape
absence_means: Use envoy_cluster_upstream_rq_time histogram directly

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_time
definition: Upstream request duration histogram for latency analysis
absence_means: Latency histogram not exported in pipeline
cardinality_footguns: histogram support and percentile behavior must be validated in dashboard builder

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_cx_connect_ms
definition: Upstream connection establishment duration histogram
absence_means: Connect latency histogram not exported in pipeline
cardinality_footguns: cluster cardinality can spike with dynamic routing

name: cluster.<name>.membership_healthy
definition: Healthy hosts in upstream cluster
absence_means: Host health telemetry unavailable

name: cluster.<name>.membership_total
definition: Total hosts in upstream cluster including unhealthy
absence_means: Cluster membership telemetry unavailable

name: cluster.<name>.membership_degraded
definition: Hosts marked degraded in upstream cluster
absence_means: No degraded members or feature not active

name: cluster.<name>.circuit_breakers.default.cx_open
definition: Circuit breaker open state for connection limit
absence_means: Circuit breaker telemetry missing or feature disabled

name: cluster.<name>.circuit_breakers.default.rq_open
definition: Circuit breaker open state for request limit
absence_means: Circuit breaker telemetry missing or feature disabled

name: cluster.<name>.circuit_breakers.default.rq_pending_open
definition: Circuit breaker pending request queue open state
absence_means: Pending breaker signal not emitted in all deployments

name: cluster.<name>.circuit_breakers.default.rq_retry_open
definition: Circuit breaker retry budget open state
absence_means: Retry breaker signal not emitted in all deployments

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_active
definition: Current active upstream requests
absence_means: No active upstream requests at sample time

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_pending_total
definition: Total pending upstream requests queue depth events
absence_means: No pending request pressure observed

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_cx_pool_overflow
definition: Upstream connection pool overflow events
absence_means: No connection pool overflow observed

name: http.<prefix>.downstream_rq_total
definition: Total downstream HTTP requests handled by HCM
absence_means: HCM stats absent or non HTTP path
cardinality_footguns: http prefix cardinality can rise with dynamic config

name: http.<prefix>.downstream_cx_active
definition: Current active downstream HTTP connections by HCM
absence_means: No active downstream HTTP connections or HCM stats absent
cardinality_footguns: http conn manager prefix may be high cardinality in dynamic configs

name: http.<prefix>.downstream_cx_rx_bytes_total
definition: Total bytes received on downstream HTTP connections
absence_means: No downstream traffic or HCM stats absent
cardinality_footguns: http conn manager prefix may be high cardinality in dynamic configs

name: http.<prefix>.downstream_cx_tx_bytes_total
definition: Total bytes transmitted on downstream HTTP connections
absence_means: No downstream traffic or HCM stats absent
cardinality_footguns: http conn manager prefix may be high cardinality in dynamic configs

name: http.<prefix>.downstream_rq_5xx
definition: Legacy per-class downstream metric not present in this Tsuga shape
absence_means: Use envoy_http_downstream_rq_xx filtered by response class 5xx

name: http.<prefix>.downstream_rq_4xx
definition: Legacy per-class downstream metric not present in this Tsuga shape
absence_means: Use envoy_http_downstream_rq_xx filtered by response class 4xx

name: http.<prefix>.downstream_rq_xx
definition: Downstream HTTP requests by response code class via context.envoy_response_code_class
absence_means: Response class split unavailable if tag dropped
cardinality_footguns: class split requires filter handling not separate metric names

name: http.<prefix>.downstream_rq_time
definition: Downstream HTTP request duration histogram
absence_means: Histogram not exported or filtered out
cardinality_footguns: histogram support in builder must be validated

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: Envoy metrics do not include direct billing data and cost requires external cloud billing join
absence_means: Cost analysis requires infrastructure billing datasets

name: cluster.<name>.lb_healthy_panic
definition: Load balancer panic mode where healthy host percentage dropped below panic threshold
absence_means: No panic events observed

name: cluster.<name>.assignment_stale
definition: Cluster assignment marked stale by control-plane update path
absence_means: No stale assignment events

name: cluster.<name>.assignment_timeout_received
definition: Timed-out cluster assignment update events received
absence_means: No assignment timeout events

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_retry_limit_exceeded
definition: Upstream requests where retry limit was exceeded
absence_means: No retry limit exceeded events

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_retry_overflow
definition: Retry attempts dropped due to overflow conditions
absence_means: No retry overflow events

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_rq_retry_backoff_ratelimited
definition: Retries rate-limited by backoff policy
absence_means: No retry backoff rate-limit events

name: cluster.<name>.upstream_cx_connect_attempts_exceeded
definition: Connection attempt limit exceeded before successful upstream connection
absence_means: No connect-attempt exceed events

name: http.<prefix>.downstream_rq_idle_timeout
definition: Downstream requests terminated due to idle timeout
absence_means: No downstream idle timeout events
cardinality_footguns: http conn manager prefix may be high cardinality in dynamic configs

name: http.<prefix>.downstream_rq_header_timeout
definition: Downstream requests timed out waiting for headers
absence_means: No downstream header timeout events
cardinality_footguns: http conn manager prefix may be high cardinality in dynamic configs

name: http.<prefix>.downstream_rq_timeout
definition: Downstream requests timed out after upstream attempt
absence_means: No downstream timeout events
cardinality_footguns: http conn manager prefix may be high cardinality in dynamic configs

name: http.<prefix>.downstream_rq_rx_reset
definition: Downstream requests reset on receive path
absence_means: No downstream request resets observed
cardinality_footguns: http conn manager prefix may be high cardinality in dynamic configs

name: http.<prefix>.downstream_rq_tx_reset
definition: Downstream requests reset on transmit path
absence_means: No downstream request resets observed
cardinality_footguns: http conn manager prefix may be high cardinality in dynamic configs

name: runtime.load_error
definition: Runtime configuration load errors
absence_means: No runtime load error events observed

name: server.main_thread_watchdog_miss
definition: Main thread watchdog miss events
absence_means: No main-thread watchdog miss events

name: server.worker_watchdog_miss
definition: Worker thread watchdog miss events
absence_means: No worker watchdog miss events
